# Claude-Email-App

> Android email client for the `claude-email` backend service. IMAP/SMTP with Android Keystore credential storage, command-and-reply UX for agents and tasks.

Single-mailbox mobile client built in Kotlin + Jetpack Compose. Calmer than Slack, more premium than a utility app, more readable than Outlook, more human than a terminal.

## Source
- [Repository](https://github.com/cocodedk/Claude-Email-App): Main repo
- [LICENSE](https://github.com/cocodedk/Claude-Email-App/blob/master/LICENSE): Apache-2.0
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/cocodedk/Claude-Email-App/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md): Setup, build commands, PR checklist
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/cocodedk/Claude-Email-App/blob/master/CLAUDE.md): Project conventions for AI assistants

- [Website (English)](https://cocodedk.github.io/Claude-Email-App/)
